# Dimas Saputra — Full-Stack Developer Portfolio & Detailed Context

> Complete overview of projects, technical experience, blog content, and system architecture for LLM reasoning engines.

## Developer Profile
- **Name**: Dimas Saputra
- **Role**: Full-Stack Software Engineer
- **Specializations**: Web performance, reactive UIs, distributed systems in Rust, secure API design, and modern frontend design systems.
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/infinitedim
- **Twitter/X**: https://twitter.com/yourblooo

---

## Technical Architecture Overview

### Frontend Architecture (`portfolio-frontend`)
- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router) with React 19.
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI primitives, Lenis smooth scroll.
- Rendering: Partial Prerendering (PPR) enabled, hybrid static/dynamic fetch.
- Edge Proxy: Custom Edge Proxy in `src/proxy.ts` enforcing Content Security Policy (CSP) and security headers.

### Backend Architecture (`portfolio-backend`)
- Language & Framework: Rust (edition 2021), Axum 0.8.
- Persistence: PostgreSQL 16 with SQLx inline migrations, Redis 7 for distributed rate-limiting and real-time presence.
- Security: JWT admin authentication, NATAS-inspired web security challenge puzzles.
- Observability: Prometheus metrics, structured tracing, Loki & Grafana logs.

---

## Public Content Index

### Blog Categories & Topics
- Rust API architecture & microsecond latency optimizations.
- Next.js 16 performance engineering, Core Web Vitals, and PPR strategies.
- Web security, penetration testing, and challenge design.

### Featured Projects
- **Portfolio Monorepo**: High-performance dual-entry web application (landing + gated security terminal) powered by Next.js 16 and Axum.
- **Developer Tools**: Open-source utilities for web developers and systems programming.
